public interface ICrudMethod<out T> : IMethod, 
	IProcessingEntityMethod<T>, IProcessingEntityMethod
where T : ITypedEntityWrapper

Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)

Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data, and returns no data.

Configures a dynamic WHERE clause that limits the objects that can be assigned as a foreign-key value.

WithParameterExtendedDataT(Boolean)Overloaded.
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method only supports parameter sets that have already been created.
(Defined by TypedExtensions.)
WithParameterExtendedDataT(String)Overloaded.
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method supports creation of new parameter sets, where the supplied column name points to the owner of the parent parameter set.
(Defined by TypedExtensions.)
WithPropertyListT
Applies the property list to an entity method.
(Defined by TypedExtensions.)

Configures a route to read a single entity, automatically adding primary key value parameters.
